mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(user_name, user_password, user_email, user_info, head_img, create_time) values(#{sysUser.username}, #{sysUser.userPassword}, #{sysUser.userEmail}, #{sysUser.userInfo}, #{sysUser.headImg}, #{sysUser.createTime})

insert into sys_user(user_name, user_password, user_email, user_info, head_img, create_time) values(#{sysUser.username}, #{sysUser.userPassword}, #{sysUser.userEmail}, #{sysUser.userInfo}, #{sysUser.headImg}, #{sysUser.createTime})

select last_insert_id() as id
insert into sys_user(user_name, user_password, user_email, user_info, head_img, create_time) values(#{sysUser.username}, #{sysUser.userPassword}, #{sysUser.userEmail}, #{sysUser.userInfo}, #{sysUser.headImg}, #{sysUser.createTime})

(#{sysUser.username}, #{sysUser.userPassword}, #{sysUser.userEmail}, #{sysUser.userInfo}, #{sysUser.headImg}, #{sysUser.createTime})

(#{sysUser.username}, #{sysUser.userPassword}, #{sysUser.userEmail}, #{sysUser.userInfo}, #{sysUser.headImg}, #{sysUser.createTime})
